---
id: v-2-units-tenancy-put
title: "Move-in (create or update tenancy)"
description: "Record a tenancy on a unit: mark it occupied, clear any lockout, and optionally create or update the tenant so they can claim the unit in the app."
sidebar_label: "Move-in (create or update tenancy)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: reference/kiss-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Move-in (create or update tenancy)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/units/{ulid}/tenancy"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Record a tenancy on a unit: mark it occupied, clear any lockout, and optionally create or update the tenant so they can claim the unit in the app.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
